System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference DK0_H4Mk_L38_6C32_IUPR_measure_20140919T111803.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E1
Receive ID 7E9
Functional Addr 6E
Functional Name BVA
